sections.title: Murder
sections.description: Whoever causes death of any person, intending to cause such death or intending to cause such bodily injury as is likely to cause death, or with the knowledge that the act is likely to cause death, commits the offence of murder.
sections.punishment: Death or imprisonment for life, and fine
sections.chapter: VI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Culpable homicide not amounting to murder
sections.description: Whoever causes death by doing an act with the intention of causing death, or with the intention of causing such bodily injury as is likely to cause death, or with the knowledge that such act is likely to cause death, commits culpable homicide not amounting to murder if the act is done without premeditation in a sudden fight in the heat of passion.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment for life, or imprisonment up to 10 years, and fine
sections.chapter: VI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Dowry death
sections.description: Where the death of a woman is caused by any burns or bodily injury or occurs otherwise than under normal circumstances within seven years of her marriage and it is shown that soon before her death she was subjected to cruelty or harassment by her husband or any relative of her husband for, or in connection with, any demand for dowry.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment not less than 7 years, extendable to imprisonment for life
sections.chapter: VI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Abetment of suicide
sections.description: If any person commits suicide, whoever abets the commission of such suicide, shall be punished.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 10 years and fine
sections.chapter: VI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Attempt to murder
sections.description: Whoever does any act with such intention or knowledge, and under such circumstances that, if by that act caused death, would be guilty of murder, shall be punished.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 10 years and fine; if hurt is caused, imprisonment for life or up to 10 years and fine
sections.chapter: VI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Voluntarily causing hurt
sections.description: Whoever does any act with the intention of thereby causing hurt to any person, or with the knowledge that such act is likely to cause hurt to any person, and does thereby cause hurt to any person, is said to voluntarily cause hurt.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 1 year, or fine up to Rs 10,000, or both
sections.chapter: VI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Voluntarily causing grievous hurt
sections.description: Whoever voluntarily causes hurt, if the hurt which is intended to be caused or known to be likely to be caused is grievous hurt, and if the hurt caused is grievous hurt, commits the offence of voluntarily causing grievous hurt.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years and fine
sections.chapter: VI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Voluntarily causing hurt or grievous hurt by dangerous weapons or means
sections.description: Whoever voluntarily causes hurt by means of any instrument for shooting, stabbing or cutting, or any instrument which, used as a weapon of offence, is likely to cause death, or by means of fire or any heated substance, or by means of any poison or corrosive substance, or by means of any explosive substance, or by means of any substance which is deleterious to the human body to inhale, to swallow, or to receive into the blood.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both (for hurt); imprisonment up to 7 years, and fine (for grievous hurt)
sections.chapter: VI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Voluntarily causing hurt to deter public servant from duty
sections.description: Whoever voluntarily causes hurt to any person being a public servant in the discharge of his duty as such public servant, or with intent to prevent or deter that person from discharging his duty.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: VI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Causing death by rash or negligent act
sections.description: Whoever causes the death of any person by doing any rash or negligent act not amounting to culpable homicide.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 5 years and fine; if by rash or negligent driving, imprisonment up to 7 years and fine
sections.chapter: VI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Act endangering life or personal safety of others
sections.description: Whoever does any act so rashly or negligently as to endanger human life or the personal safety of others.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 months, or fine up to Rs 2,500, or both
sections.chapter: VI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Causing hurt by act endangering life or personal safety
sections.description: Whoever does any act so rashly or negligently as to endanger human life or personal safety of others, and thereby causes hurt or grievous hurt.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 6 months or fine up to Rs 5,000 or both (hurt); imprisonment up to 3 years or fine or both (grievous hurt)
sections.chapter: VI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Theft
sections.description: Whoever, intending to take dishonestly any movable property out of the possession of any person without that person's consent, moves that property in order to such taking, is said to commit theft.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: V - Of Offences Against Property

sections.title: Robbery
sections.description: In all robbery there is either theft or extortion. When theft is robbery: theft is robbery if, in order to commit theft, or in committing theft, or in carrying away or attempting to carry away property obtained by theft, the offender voluntarily causes or attempts to cause death, hurt or wrongful restraint, or fear of instant death, hurt or wrongful restraint.
sections.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment up to 10 years and fine; if on highway between sunset and sunrise, imprisonment up to 14 years
sections.chapter: V - Of Offences Against Property

sections.title: Dacoity
sections.description: When five or more persons conjointly commit or attempt to commit a robbery, or where the whole number of persons conjointly committing or attempting to commit a robbery, and persons present and aiding such commission or attempt, amount to five or more, every person so committing, attempting or aiding, is said to commit dacoity.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment for life or rigorous imprisonment up to 10 years, and fine
sections.chapter: V - Of Offences Against Property

sections.title: Snatching
sections.description: Whoever commits theft, with the intention to cause any wrongful loss to the person robbed, by snatching any property or article from the person, and for that purpose uses force or violence or creates fear of force or violence.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years and fine
sections.chapter: V - Of Offences Against Property

sections.title: Cheating
sections.description: Whoever, by deceiving any person, fraudulently or dishonestly induces the person so deceived to deliver any property to any person, or to consent that any person shall retain any property, or intentionally induces the person so deceived to do or omit to do anything which he would not do or omit if he were not so deceived, and which act or omission causes or is likely to cause damage or harm to that person in body, mind, reputation or property.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property by Fraud

sections.title: Cheating by personation
sections.description: A person is said to cheat by personation if he cheats by pretending to be some other person, or by knowingly substituting one person for another, or representing that he or any other person is a person other than he or such other person really is.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 5 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property by Fraud

sections.title: Criminal breach of trust
sections.description: Whoever, being in any manner entrusted with property, or with any dominion over property, dishonestly misappropriates or converts to his own use that property, or dishonestly uses or disposes of that property in violation of any direction of law prescribing the mode in which such trust is to be discharged, or of any legal contract.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property by Fraud

sections.title: Extortion
sections.description: Whoever intentionally puts any person in fear of any injury to that person, or to any other, and thereby dishonestly induces the person so put in fear to deliver to any person any property or valuable security, or anything signed or sealed which may be converted into a valuable security, commits extortion.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: V - Of Offences Against Property

sections.title: Criminal trespass
sections.description: Whoever enters into or upon property in the possession of another with intent to commit an offence or to intimidate, insult or annoy any person in possession of such property, or having lawfully entered into or upon such property, unlawfully remains there with intent thereby to intimidate, insult or annoy any such person, or with intent to commit an offence.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 months, or fine up to Rs 5,000, or both
sections.chapter: XVIII - Of Criminal Trespass

sections.title: House trespass
sections.description: Whoever commits criminal trespass by entering into or remaining in any building, tent or vessel used as a human dwelling or any building used as a place for worship, or as a place for the custody of property.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 1 year, or fine up to Rs 5,000, or both
sections.chapter: XVIII - Of Criminal Trespass

sections.title: House-breaking
sections.description: A person is said to commit house-breaking who commits house-trespass if he effects his entrance into the house or any part of it in any of the six ways: if he enters or quits through a passage made by himself, or by any abettor of the house-trespass.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years and fine
sections.chapter: XVIII - Of Criminal Trespass

sections.title: Assault or criminal force on woman with intent to outrage her modesty
sections.description: Whoever assaults or uses criminal force to any woman, intending to outrage or knowing it to be likely that he will thereby outrage her modesty.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment not less than 1 year, extendable up to 5 years, and fine
sections.chapter: V - Of Offences Against Women

sections.title: Sexual harassment
sections.description: A man committing any of the following acts: physical contact and advances involving unwelcome and explicit sexual overtures, a demand or request for sexual favours, showing pornography against the will of a woman, making sexually coloured remarks.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both; for repeat offence, imprisonment up to 5 years and fine
sections.chapter: V - Of Offences Against Women

sections.title: Assault or use of criminal force to woman with intent to disrobe
sections.description: Any man who assaults or uses criminal force to any woman or abets such act with the intention of disrobing or compelling her to be naked.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment not less than 3 years, extendable up to 7 years, and fine
sections.chapter: V - Of Offences Against Women

sections.title: Voyeurism
sections.description: Any man who watches, or captures the image of a woman engaging in a private act in circumstances where she would usually have the expectation of not being observed either by the perpetrator or by any other person at the behest of the perpetrator.
sections.punishment: First conviction: imprisonment not less than 1 year, up to 3 years, and fine; second conviction: imprisonment not less than 3 years, up to 7 years, and fine
sections.chapter: V - Of Offences Against Women

sections.title: Stalking
sections.description: Any man who follows a woman and contacts, or attempts to contact such woman to foster personal interaction repeatedly despite a clear indication of disinterest by such woman, or monitors the use by a woman of the internet, email or any other form of electronic communication.
sections.punishment: First conviction: imprisonment up to 3 years and fine; second conviction: imprisonment up to 5 years and fine
sections.chapter: V - Of Offences Against Women

sections.title: Rape
sections.description: A man is said to commit rape if he penetrates, manipulates, or applies his mouth or causes penetration, manipulation or application of mouth by a woman, under circumstances falling under any of seven descriptions including against her will, without consent, with consent obtained by fear, etc.
sections.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment not less than 10 years, extendable to imprisonment for life, and fine
sections.chapter: V - Of Offences Against Women

sections.title: Husband or relative of husband of a woman subjecting her to cruelty
sections.description: Whoever, being the husband or the relative of the husband of a woman, subjects such woman to cruelty shall be punished. Cruelty means any wilful conduct which drives the woman to commit suicide or to cause grave injury or danger to life, limb or health of the woman, or harassment with a view to coercing her or any person related to her to meet any unlawful demand for any property or valuable security.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years and fine
sections.chapter: V - Of Offences Against Women

sections.title: Kidnapping
sections.description: Whoever takes or entices any person from India or from lawful guardianship, is said to kidnap that person.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years and fine
sections.chapter: VII - Of Kidnapping, Abduction and Related Offences

sections.title: Kidnapping or abducting with intent to murder
sections.description: Whoever kidnaps or abducts any person in order that such person may be murdered or may be so disposed of as to be put in danger of being murdered.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment for life or rigorous imprisonment up to 10 years, and fine
sections.chapter: VII - Of Kidnapping, Abduction and Related Offences

sections.title: Criminal intimidation
sections.description: Whoever threatens another with any injury to his person, reputation or property, or to the person or reputation of any one in whom that person is interested, with intent to cause alarm to that person, or to cause that person to do any act which he is not legally bound to do, or to omit to do any act which that person is legally entitled to do.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years, or fine, or both; if threat to cause death or grievous hurt: imprisonment up to 7 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XX - Of Criminal Intimidation

sections.title: Criminal intimidation by anonymous communication
sections.description: Whoever commits the offence of criminal intimidation by an anonymous communication, or having taken precaution to conceal the name or abode of the person from whom the threat comes.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years, in addition to punishment for criminal intimidation
sections.chapter: XX - Of Criminal Intimidation

sections.title: Word, gesture or act intended to insult the modesty of a woman
sections.description: Whoever, intending to insult the modesty of any woman, utters any words, makes any sound or gesture, or exhibits any object, intending that such word or sound shall be heard, or that such gesture or object shall be seen, by such woman, or intrudes upon the privacy of such woman.
sections.punishment: Simple imprisonment up to 3 years and fine
sections.chapter: XX - Of Defamation

sections.title: Criminal misappropriation of property
sections.description: Whoever dishonestly misappropriates or converts to his own use any movable property.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property by Fraud

sections.title: Forgery
sections.description: Whoever makes any false document or false electronic record or part of a document or electronic record, with intent to cause damage or injury to the public or to any person, or to support any claim or title, or to cause any person to part with property, or to enter into any express or implied contract, or with intent to commit fraud or that fraud may be committed, commits forgery.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XVIII - Of Forgery

sections.title: Defamation
sections.description: Whoever, by words either spoken or intended to be read, or by signs or by visible representations, makes or publishes any imputation concerning any person intending to harm, or knowing or having reason to believe that such imputation will harm, the reputation of such person, is said to defame that person.
sections.punishment: Simple imprisonment up to 2 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XIX - Of Defamation

sections.title: Dishonest delivery of property
sections.description: Whoever dishonestly or fraudulently delivers to any person any property.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property by Fraud

sections.title: Organised crime
sections.description: Any continuing unlawful activity including kidnapping, robbery, vehicle theft, extortion, land grabbing, contract killing, economic offence, cyber-crimes having severe consequences, committed by a member of an organised crime syndicate, individually or jointly, as a member of such syndicate or on its behalf.
sections.punishment: Death or imprisonment for life and fine not less than Rs 10 lakh; if member: imprisonment not less than 5 years, extendable to imprisonment for life, and fine not less than Rs 5 lakh
sections.chapter: VI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Petty organised crime
sections.description: Any person who is a member of a group or gang, either singly or jointly, commits any act of theft, snatching, cheating, unauthorized selling of tickets, unauthorized betting or gambling, selling of public examination question papers or any other similar criminal act.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment not less than 1 year, extendable up to 7 years, and fine
sections.chapter: VI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Terrorist act
sections.description: Whoever does any act with intent to threaten or likely to threaten the unity, integrity, sovereignty, security, or economic security of India or with intent to strike terror or likely to strike terror in the people or any section of the people in India or in any foreign country.
sections.punishment: Death or imprisonment for life and fine; if results in death: death or imprisonment for life; conspirator: imprisonment not less than 5 years, extendable to imprisonment for life and fine not less than Rs 5 lakh
sections.chapter: VI - Of Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.title: Mischief
sections.description: Whoever with intent to cause, or knowing that he is likely to cause, wrongful loss or damage to the public or to any person, causes the destruction of any property, or any such change in any property or in the situation thereof as destroys or diminishes its value or utility, or affects it injuriously, commits mischief.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 months, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: V - Of Offences Against Property

sections.title: Rioting
sections.description: Whenever force or violence is used by an unlawful assembly, or by any member thereof, in prosecution of the common object of such assembly, every member of such assembly is guilty of the offence of rioting.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XI - Of Offences Against Public Tranquility

sections.title: Rioting armed with deadly weapon
sections.description: Whoever is guilty of rioting, being armed with a deadly weapon or with anything which, used as a weapon of offence, is likely to cause death.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XI - Of Offences Against Public Tranquility

sections.title: Receiving stolen property
sections.description: Whoever dishonestly receives or retains any stolen property, knowing or having reason to believe the same to be stolen property.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both
sections.chapter: XVII - Of Offences Against Property by Fraud

sections.title: Word, gesture or act intended to insult modesty of a woman
sections.description: Whoever, intending to insult the modesty of any woman, utters any words, makes any sound or gesture, or exhibits any object.
sections.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years and fine
sections.chapter: V - Of Offences Against Women
